worker.started.description: Notify ws-mcp bridge when a worker starts

worker.committed.description: Notify ws-mcp bridge when a worker commits

worker.pushed.description: Notify ws-mcp bridge when a worker pushes

worker.completed.description: Notify ws-mcp bridge when a worker completes

_comment: Copy relevant hooks into your multiclaude or Claude Code settings. Environment variables like $WORKER_NAME are provided by multiclaude at hook invocation time.
